resources.string: Ovozni aniqlashni yoqish yoki oʻchirish uchun %1$s tugmasini bosing; ushbu yordam oynasini ochish uchun %2$s tugmasini bosing; nutq sozlamalarini oʻzgartirish uchun esa %3$s tugmasini bosing.
Qaysi yurish ekanligi aniq boʻlmasa, bir nechta strelkalar chiqadi. Kerakli yurishni tanlash uchun tegishli koʻrsatkichning rangi yoki raqamini ayting.

string.name: instructions3
string.comment:
%1$s is "yes", %2$s is "no". Both of these are deliberately in English, which is the only language supported for voice commands.
This is a complicated concept more easy to understand in practice. Voice commands can be misheard and Lichess will not always be fully certain what you said. Several arrows will be shown to identify e.g. if the move was 'b4' or 'd4', which often sound similar. The most likely move the player wants will have a circle showing around it, but it will be possible to cancel before it is played (for example, by shouting 'no!').
You can see a visual example here: https://lichess.org/@/schlawg/blog/how-to-lichess-voice/nWrypoWI

resources.string: Agar strelkada radar aylanayotgan boʻlsa, doira toʻlishi bilan oʻsha yurish amalga oshadi. Bu vaqt ichida yurishni darhol bajarish uchun %1$s, bekorqilish uchun %2$s deb ayting yoki boshqa strelkaning rangi/raqamini ayting. Bu taymerni sozlamalarda oʻzgartirish yoki oʻchirib qoʻyish mumkin.
Shovqinli joylarda %s funksiyasini yoqing. Bu funksiya yoniq boʻlganda, buyruqlarni aytish vaqtida \"Shift\" tugmasini bosib turing.
Vertikallarni (a–h) aniqroq tanib olish uchun fonetik alifbodan foydalaning.
Ovozli yurish sozlamalari haqida batafsil maʼlumot %s berilgan.
e4 katagiga yurish yoki e4 dagi donani tanlash
Filni tanlash yoki filni urib olish
Fonetik alifbodan foydalanish eng ishonchli usuldir
Taymerni toʻxtatish yoki soʻrovni rad etish
Tanlangan yurishni bajarish yoki amalni tasdiqlash
Kutish rejimi (agar faollashtiruvchi soʻz yoqilgan boʻlsa)
